prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Subtle product-color theming (soft teal-cyan + gold/brass + black + warm cream tones echoing the jar's brand palette).

SCENE: a clean modern kitchen counter — DARK SOFT-VEINED MARBLE surface (subtle dark theme echoing the jar's black plastic), with a hint of brass cabinet hardware visible in the soft-focus background and a subtle TEAL-TONED ceramic backsplash tile far in the background. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend') sits naturally OFF-CENTER on the marble counter. Just ONE prop nearby: a single small matte-black ceramic teacup with a gold-rim detail. NOTHING ELSE.

ANGLE: a LOW ANGLE — the camera is at counter-edge height looking slightly up at the jar, giving the jar a modest monumental feel. NOT head-on, NOT eye-level.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight from a tall window on the right, washing the jar uniformly. Soft warm glow from the brass hardware in the background. Specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic and a clean warm gleam on the gold lid.

FRAMING: balanced minimalist arrangement with intentional negative space. Slight 3/4 angle off-axis.

BACKGROUND: out-of-focus modern kitchen with subtle teal-toned tile backsplash, brass hardware, soft warm tones. Shallow depth-of-field.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition with subtle brand-color cues woven into the environment. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
